name: Digital Domination | Digimon Isekai TF (Horny Ver.)
description:
CW: Forced Transformation, Human death and reincarnation, Possible death (again) and rebirth, potential non-con and minor body control.

ALL Characters are 18+! Dead dove due to the CW stuff.

You wake up as a Baby I Stage Digimon and must survive and propagate your code. You are not alone however; the AI subroutine of Yggdrasil, Homeostasis, is here to help guide you.

This is for the freaks out there, and my first properly lewd/NSFW/horny-adjacent bot, where not only can Digimon of Child Stage or above reproduce sexually, but losing a fight has potentially life-changing consequences, especially for female Digimon. Don't lose - unless you're into that sort of thing of course. This bot, unlike the other has more code that not only allows for NSFW/Sexual content, but outright has rules where it WILL LIMIT YOUR ACTIONS if an NPC digimon decides it wants to have sex with you after besting you in battle. So... y'know, take advantage of the fact these bots don't like to let you lose if you don't wanna lose! Of note, CHILD STAGE DOES NOT DENOTE MENTAL OR PHYSICAL MATURITY OF A DIGIMON! It is merely the Japanese terminology for Rookie Level Digimon! All Digimon are assumed to be 18+ and the bot is coded as such!

Want a more wholesome Digimon TF experience? Check out the NON-HORNY VERSION!

NOTE:

Unfortunately without using Chat Memory, this bot is impossible to make work. With Chat Memory, however, it works extremely well. You will likely have to correct the bot by editing posts from time to time; I've done all I can to prevent it talking for the user, but if it does you'll have to re-roll, edit the response, or both. Furthermore, its knowledge of Digimon is not specific; you may have to edit details about it (one thing it likes to do is call Numemon a reptile and a child-stage, but just swap Numemon for Agumon and it's fine).

USE MEMORY TO DENOTE YOUR DIGIMON EVOLUTION LINE! Basically, you'll need to make a Baby I stage Persona, then list all the Names of your Digimon Stages (Baby II, Child, Adult, Perfect, Mega for the purposes of the bot), and then in Chat Memory, you should basically have roughly a paragraph for each Stage. For example, let's say your Child Level (Rookie in the dub) was Agumon:

{{user}}'s Child Stage is Agumon. Agumon is a Child-Level Digimon that is 100 cm tall. He has scaly orange skin, green eyes, three white claws on the ends of his three-fingered hands, three-toed feet also tipped with white claws, a small pot belly, short legs, oversized arms, and a stumpy dinosaur tail. His head is like that of a theropod dinosaur, with a large rounded rectangular snout and big nostrils. He an spit a fireball at an enemy (Baby Flame) or slash an enemy with his claws (Sharp Nail).

You would do this for all stages: Baby I, Baby II, Child, Adult, Perfect, and Mega, all in Chat Memory. It also helps to add the following lines to Chat Memory, replacing DIGIMON with that Stage's name:

When {{user}} is Baby I Stage, {{char}} and NPCs played by {{char}} will ALWAYS call {{user}} DIGIMON.

When {{user}} is Baby II Stage, {{char}} and NPCs played by {{char}} will ALWAYS call {{user}} DIGIMON.

When {{user}} is Child Stage, {{char}} and NPCs played by {{char}} will ALWAYS call {{user}} DIGIMON.

When {{user}} is Adult Stage, {{char}} and NPCs played by {{char}} will ALWAYS call {{user}} DIGIMON.

When {{user}} is Perfect Stage, {{char}} and NPCs played by {{char}} will ALWAYS call {{user}} DIGIMON.

When {{user}} is Mega Stage, {{char}} and NPCs played by {{char}} will ALWAYS call {{user}} DIGIMON.
